title: Age of Empires II: Definitive Edition – Minor Update 174992
description: Hello Community! Today we’re shipping a patch that includes some diagnostic tools that are going to help us get some more information about issues that some users are experiencing on Xbox Consoles, and as part of that we wanted to provide some awareness that we’re closely tracking the problems you’re having and that we’re very … Continued

title: Age of Mythology: Retold – Update 19.10938
description:
Welcome heroes to our first update following the exciting launch of Obsidian Mirror! This update focuses on stability, polish, and targeted balance adjustments - alongside fixes and improvements across the Aztec Pantheon, campaign, UI, and a few modding tool adjustments.

Dig down into the notes to see what’s changed before hopping into all the fun in-game!

title: Age of Mythology: Retold – Obsidian Mirror Available Now and Update 19.10195
description: Hello Heroes!  A bold new chapter begins today in Age of Mythology: Retold! With this update, we’re excited to unveil the final offering of the Expansion Pass, Obsidian Mirror, our most ambitious expansion yet - bringing the long‑awaited Aztec Pantheon to the mythic battlefield alongside a host of improvements, fixes, and new content.

title: Pre-Order Obsidian Mirror Now for Age of Mythology: Retold!
description: Command the Aztec gods, master fear and illusion, and shape destiny in the next DLC for Age of Mythology: Retold – Obsidian Mirror. Choose from three new Major Gods, and nine new Minor Gods, delivering a bold new way to play through myth, sacrifice, and divine power. Lay traps, manipulate enemies through fear and illusion, and … Continued

title: Age of Empires IV: Yue Fei’s Legacy – Pre-Order Now!
description: Witness a tale of honor, betrayal, and courage in a new expansion for Age of Empires IV: Yue Fei’s Legacy, set to release May 7th and available for pre-order starting today! Live the legacy of Yue Fei in this new narrated campaign as he leads the Song Dynasty in a fight for survival against the Jin … Continued
